name: Tile Adhesive Calculator
seo_title: Tile Adhesive Calculator C1 C2 – kg
seo_description: Tile Adhesive Calculator. Area, Application type, Adhesive type — get Consumption per m², Total kg (+5%), 25 kg bags instantly for your flooring and.

range_hints.area: Area to cover with ceramic/porcelain tiles

result_context: For {area} m² with {tipo_colocacion}: {total_kg} kg of adhesive ({sacos_25kg} bags of 25kg). Consumption: {kg_m2} kg/m².
formula_display: Single coating = 4 kg/m²; Double coating = 8 kg/m²; Total = Area x Consumption
steps: Determine consumption by method: double coating = 8 kg/m²
For double coating: Apply adhesive to substrate AND to tile back
mistakes: Not using double coating for tiles larger than 30x30cm
Using same adhesive indoors and outdoors (must be flexible outdoors)
Not respecting adhesive open time (dries before placing tile)
